text: The provisions of this article shall be applicable to any association which is primarily owned by or comprised of new motor vehicle dealers and acts on behalf of its new motor vehicle franchisees.

# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 6. New Motor Vehicle Board [3000 - 3085.10]
#### Article 6. Export and Sale-for-Resale Prohibition Hearings [3085 - 3085.10]
##### § 3085.8

The provisions of this article shall be applicable to any association which is primarily owned by or comprised of new motor vehicle dealers and acts on behalf of its new motor vehicle franchisees.

*(Added by Stats. 2019, Ch. 796, Sec. 17. (AB 179) Effective January 1, 2020. Repealed as of January 1, 2030, pursuant to Section 3085.10.)*

subsections.text: The provisions of this article shall be applicable to any association which is primarily owned by or comprised of new motor vehicle dealers and acts on behalf of its new motor vehicle franchisees.
